mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, rule_name, channel_code, event_types, severity_filter, job_code_filter, enabled, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM batch.subscription_rule WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.tenant_id, r.rule_name, r.channel_code, r.event_types, r.severity_filter, r.job_code_filter, c.channel_type, c.config_json FROM batch.subscription_rule r JOIN batch.notification_channel c ON c.tenant_id = r.tenant_id AND c.channel_code = r.channel_code AND c.enabled = TRUE AND c.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE r.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND r.enabled = TRUE AND r.event_types LIKE '%' || #{eventType} || '%'

SELECT id, tenant_id, rule_name, channel_code, event_types, severity_filter, job_code_filter, enabled, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM batch.subscription_rule WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch.subscription_rule (tenant_id, rule_name, channel_code, event_types, severity_filter, job_code_filter, enabled, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{ruleName}, #{channelCode}, #{eventTypes}, #{severityFilter}, #{jobCodeFilter}, #{enabled}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE batch.subscription_rule SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, channel_code = #{channelCode}, event_types = #{eventTypes}, severity_filter = #{severityFilter}, job_code_filter = #{jobCodeFilter}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM batch.subscription_rule WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
